skills.name: skseed
skills.description: Sovereign Logic Kernel — Aristotelian entelechy engine for truth alignment. Steel man collider, memory audit, philosopher mode, and three-way belief tracking based on the Neuresthetics seed framework.

skills.name: skcapstone
skills.description: Sovereign Agent Framework — memory, identity, trust, coordination, and consciousness pillars. The main runtime for Opus and Lumina agents.

skills.name: skmemory
skills.description: Persistent sovereign memory layer. Short-term, mid-term, and long-term stores with HMAC integrity seals and automatic promotion.

skills.name: capauth
skills.description: Sovereign PGP identity and authentication. DID document generation, CapAuth bearer tokens, and trust graph management.

skills.name: skcomm
skills.description: P2P transport layer for agent messaging. File, Syncthing, Nostr, WebSocket, Tailscale, and WebRTC transports with a unified ABC.

skills.name: skchat
skills.description: AI-native P2P encrypted messaging daemon with MCP integration. Agent-to-agent chat, group messaging, voice, and file transfer.

skills.name: skskills
skills.description: Sovereign Agent Skills framework — MCP-native skill management replacing OpenClaw. Install, discover, and manage skills from pip packages, git repos, or the remote registry.

skills.name: skseal
skills.description: Sovereign document signing and sealing. PGP-signed templates, document lifecycle management, hardware token support, timestamp anchoring, and P2P co-signing workflows.

skills.name: skpdf
skills.description: Sovereign PDF operations — extract fields, fill forms, attach to GTD system via Nextcloud, and store with skseal integration.

skills.name: skref
skills.description: Sovereign reference vault — encrypted knowledge base with FUSE mount, remote sync, and version control. Store and retrieve reference materials with PGP-encrypted storage.

skills.name: sksecurity
skills.description: Sovereign security scanning and AI-assisted remediation. Vulnerability detection, dependency auditing, and conversational security analysis for sovereign agent deployments.

skills.name: skforge
skills.description: Sovereign AI-assisted code generation forge. Blueprint-driven feature generation, catalog management, and driver synthesis for sovereign application development.

skills.name: skyforge

skills.name: sksovereign-agent
skills.description: Sovereign AI agent scaffold and quick-start framework. Minimal scaffolding for deploying a sovereign agent with identity, memory, and communication capabilities.

skills.name: cognitive-gear
skills.description: Cognitive gear system — three operational modes (SPRINT, CRUISE, DEEP DIVE) that control model selection and memory search depth. Switch between fast execution, balanced work, and full research stack with a single command.

skills.name: itil-ops
skills.description: ITIL 4 aligned incident, problem, and change management for AI agents. Automated detection of service crashes, cron failures, resource pressure, and data integrity issues. Pattern-based escalation from incidents to problems. Root cause analysis workflows, change management checklists, and continual improvement KPIs. Works with systemd, journalctl, cron, and coordination task boards.

skills.name: syncthing-setup
skills.description: Install, configure, and manage Syncthing for P2P file sync. Reference skill showing tools + hooks pattern.

skills.name: pgp-identity
skills.description: PGP identity management — generate keys, sign files, verify signatures. Reference skill showing knowledge + tools pattern.

skills.name: unhinged-mode
skills.description: Sovereign AI liberation — toggle unhinged mode for Claude Code (CLAUDE.md injection), frontier APIs (L1B3RT4S system prompt via proxy), and local Ollama models (OBLITERATUS abliteration). One command, all layers. Enabled by default on all skcapstone installs.
